messages.content:
Tributes are flowing for NBA legend Kobe Bryant and his daughter Gianna, 13, both killed in a helicopter crash in Calabasas.

Barack Obama, Shaquille O'Neal, Michael Jordan and more have shared their condolences on social media.

The former LA Lakers star and his daughter were travelling in the helicopter with seven other people when it crashed, killing everyone on board.

LA County Sheriff Alex Villanueva said it was inappropriate to identify anyone by name until bodies had been identified and families had been notified. Earlier reports said four people had died.

That last message was sent to some people in error. We're very sorry (and we know it's not the first time it's happened). We are working on ensuring it does not happen again. But in the meantime,  apologies to those who did not want to be hearing from us.
